diagrams.title: Bias-Variance Tradeoff Curve
diagrams.description: U-shaped curve showing total error vs model complexity
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how bias and variance interact to create optimal model complexity

diagrams.title: Target Diagram - Bias vs Variance
diagrams.description: Bullseye diagrams showing four scenarios: low bias/low variance (ideal), high bias/low variance (underfit), low bias/high variance (overfit), high bias/high variance (worst)
diagrams.purpose: Intuitively understand difference between bias and variance through shooting target analogy

diagrams.title: Overfitting vs Underfitting Visualization
diagrams.description: Three curves on data plot: underfit (straight line missing pattern), optimal (smooth curve following trend), overfit (wiggly line through every point)
diagrams.purpose: Recognize visual signs of underfitting and overfitting in practice
